name: Spaceman Wakes Up In A New World, The Government Has Been Experimenting On People On the Moon and Created Crazy Vine Monsters
short_description: The title says it all right... Well i have more for you. As you make your way through each Dome you must acquire Keys, Food, and Weapons. Avoid or Kill Monsters that spawn right in front of your eyes. All to escape off the moon to Alert The High Authority.
detailed_description:
This is a very simple Rogue-like game. Collect, Fight, Escape

Start By waking up on the moon. Discovering Locked doors and Collecting Items Tossed around what you will soon discover is infested with fast spreading VINE MONSTERS. Use the Weapons you Collect to Fight Hordes of Enemies. Your wits is all you need to outsmart and discover what the The High Authority has created for you hopping through ~214,748,364,700 Domes. Fully random Dome generation, including over 100 Manually customized rooms that have a chance to spawn in each dome. Each dome Logically connected to one another ready for you to find the necessary items to Escape In one of the Ships you find located in specific Domes.

Features

  • ~214,748,364,700 Domes

  • 10+ Items

  • 3 endings

  • Leader boards

  • 50+ Collectibles

  • 100+ Rooms Randomly placed in domes
